text_original: Definitely enjoyable and close to realistic. there are a few instances where the responses didn't fully line up with the storyline, but I'm glad there's a rewind button.
text_zh: 绝对很好玩，而且很逼真。有几次回复和剧情没有完全对得上，但好在有回退按钮。
reply_original: Thanks for the 4 stars! We're thrilled you find Fantasia enjoyable and realistic. We are constantly working on improving our AI's memory and story consistency. If you ever notice major storyline slips, please send screenshots to support@fantachat.ai so we can investigate. Glad the rewind button is helping you keep the story on track!
reply_zh: 感谢您的4星好评！我们非常高兴您觉得 Fantasia 既有趣又真实。我们一直在努力改进 AI 的记忆力和故事连贯性。如果您发现任何重大的剧情偏差，请发送截图至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们进行调查。很高兴回退按钮能帮您让故事保持在正轨上！
